title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Saksoft Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Saksoft Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Saksoft Global Group:
Saksoft Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft Global Group!
